raw_consumer_statement: BACK IN XXXX  XXXX  CREDIT CARD WAS STOLEN AND THE THIEF HAS MADE CHARGES ON THE ACCOUNT, AS SOON AS I FOUND OUT I IMMEDIATELY CONTACTED CITI BANK AND REPORTED AS FRAUD. I REQUESTED A NEW CARD. THEN CITI BANK DECIDED THAT THE CHARGES ARE NOT FRAUD, I A MNOT REALLY REALLY SURE HOW THEY CAME TO THAT DECISION, BASICALLY SOMEONE SITTING BEHIND A DESK DECIDED THAT THE CHARGES ARE NOT FRAUD, THE CHARGES ARE FRAUD SINCE MUCH OF THE CHARGES WERE MADE OVERSEES IN OTHER COUNTRY 'S AND ALSO HERE IN THE UNITED STATES, IT COULD NOT HAVE BEEN MINE SINCE AT THE TIME MY MOTHER WAS XXXX XXXX IN THE HOSPITAL XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX AND I HAVE PROOF OF THAT. I HAVE MANY TIMES CONFIRMED WITH CITI BANK REPRESENTATIVE WHICH CHARGES ARE NOT MINE, AND THEY HAVE ASKED ME TO SEND THEM A WRITTEN STATEMENT WHICH OF COURSE I HAVE DONE. THERE IS OVER {$10000.00} CHARGES THAT ARE FRAUDULENT. THIS IS DISCRIMINATION AGAINST MYSELF AND AGAINST MY CREDIT PROFILE. I HAVE GONE TO SMALL CLAIMS COURT AND THEY ARE DENYING MY CASE WITHOUT ANY NORMAL REASON, IT ALL BASED ON ASSUMPTION. I NEED TO KNOW WHO IN THEIR RIGHT MIND WOULD PAY FOR ITEMS OR SERVICES THAT WERE DONE FRAUDULENTLY.
